unresolved_gap_rows.why_it_still_matters: The daily table spec exists, but the canonical board-series provider is not yet frozen.
Breadth is operationalized conceptually, but the exact bounded computation rule is not yet frozen.
Turnover pressure is a required daily field, but the exact normalization rule remains open.

interpretation: V1.12V turns the board chronology gap into a bounded operational table spec.
The line still does not have a full day-by-day backfill, but it now has an auditable operational target.
This is still information-foundation work, not model or signal work.
